name: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel

reviews.originalComment: Kamar nya luas untuk harga semurah itu, ac nya dingin sejuk terasa, kamar mandi bersih dan banyak gantungan baju di kamar yg sangat membantu! Ada tv, lemari, meja rias yang besarrr
reviews.reviewComments: The room is spacious for such a low price, the air conditioning is pleasantly cool, the bathroom is clean, and there are many clothes hangers in the room which are very helpful! There is a TV, a wardrobe, and a large dressing table.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi dipusat kota, kamar luas utk keluarga dgn 2 anak remaja....harga sangat murah di app...sangat wort it
reviews.reviewComments: Location in the city center, spacious room for a family with 2 teenagers...very affordable price on the app...definitely worth it.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Estaba sucio, el baño sucio, muy mal olor, no hablaban inglés. La habitación con basura en el piso y en los muebles. Las sabanas usadas. Personas super extrañas. No pude dormir allí y finalmente cambié de hotel por el miedo que me dió. Vengo de un viaje largo por varios sitios y sólon aquí me senti insegura. No lo recomiendo!

reviews.originalComment:
Dapat yang harga dibawah 100rb. Tapi fasilitas kmaar sudah pakai Ac. Kerenlah pokoknya.
Terimakasih Hotel Daka. ☺️
reviews.reviewComments: It should be priced below 100,000. But the room facilities already have air conditioning. It's really cool overall. Thank you, Hotel Daka. ☺️

reviews.reviewTitle: Good service, nice place. Please provide Wi-Fi on the 3rd floor and fix the TV according to the order that has been specified.
reviews.originalTitle: Pelayanan baik, tempat bagus. Wifi dilantai 3 mohon disediakan dan tv diperbaiki sesuai pemesanan yg sudh tertera
reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus dan pelayanan sangat baik. fasilitas tv dan wifi tertera di pemesanan tetapi di lantai 3 wifi tidak ada dan tv tidak berfungsi. Jadi mohon untuk tv diperbaiki dan pemasangan wifi dilantai 3 sesuai fasilitas yang sudah tertulis di dalam pemesanan. jika tersedia maka mohon berfungsi dengan baik. Kedepan kami akan memesan kembali memastikan apakah hotel ini dapat perbaikan fasilitas sesuai pemesanan. Mohon pihak hotel ditingkat kembali fasilitas dan kualitas hotel sesuai pemesanan tersedia. Terima kasih
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice and the service is very good. The facilities for TV and Wi-Fi are stated in the booking, but on the 3rd floor, there is no Wi-Fi and the TV is not working. Therefore, please repair the TV and install Wi-Fi on the 3rd floor as per the facilities mentioned in the booking. If available, please ensure it functions properly. In the future, we will book again to see if this hotel can improve the facilities according to the booking. Please the hotel should enhance the facilities and quality in accordance with what is available in the booking. Thank you.

The pricing is definitely competitive.  Facilities wise, don't hope for star hotel quality, more like a homestay vibe and facilities. Room has attached bathroom but lack of basin and hot water. Mattress and the room need upgrades desperately. However with the super affordable pricing, it's worth for short stay. The hotel located a bit further away from city centre, but there are quite a lot of cafes and warongs and eateries nearby within walking distance.

reviews.reviewTitle: I was supposed to stay here for 2 nights, but I chose only 1 night even though I had already made the payment through the app.
reviews.originalTitle: Seharusnya 2x nginap disini, tapi saya memilih cuma 1x walau sudah terlanjur bayar booking diaplikasi
reviews.originalComment:
Opini jujur saya, saya rela tidak jadi menginap disini dan kehilangan uang. Saya sudah pesan sebulan lebih dari tgl booking, saya minta double bed dikasih single bed akhirnya anak saya terperosok ketengah kasur yg didempetkan. Saya minta lantai 1, dikasih lantai 3, no lift dgn barang bawaan anak kecil yg banyak. Kasur yg dikamar saya sudah terasa pernya, dan sudah mulai miring tidak datar bikin sakit pinggang. Parkiran penuh dgn motor, pagi2 banget sudah diminta utk pindahkan mobil untung kami juga sudah mau check out.
Keramik dikamar sudah ada yg pecah2 tapi pecahan keramik dibiarkan begitu saja didalam kamar.
Semoga pihak pengelola hotel memperhatikan kembali fasilitasnya, walaupun bangunan hotel lama.
reviews.reviewComments: In my honest opinion, I would rather not stay here and lose my money. I booked more than a month before the booking date, I requested a double bed but was given a single bed, which caused my child to fall into the gap between the beds. I asked for a room on the first floor but got a room on the third floor, with no lift and a lot of luggage for a small child. The mattress in my room is already sagging and not flat anymore, causing back pain. The parking is full of motorcycles, and very early in the morning we were asked to move our car, luckily we were already checking out. There are broken tiles in the room, and the broken pieces are just left there. I hope the hotel management pays more attention to its facilities, even though the hotel building is old.

reviews.reviewTitle: There is no trash can in the room.
reviews.originalTitle: Tidak tersedia tong sampah di dalam kamar
reviews.originalComment: Kami kesulitan ketika membuang sampah harus keluar kamar mencari tong sampah
reviews.reviewComments: We have difficulty throwing away trash because we have to leave the room to find a trash bin.

reviews.originalComment:
なぜか私の部屋にはシャワーがなかった。チェックインの時にバスタオルを渡してくれたのにおかしな話です。ないならないで記載すべき。このホテルを選ばなかった。インドネシア語が話せないので勘違いしているのかもしれませんけども、全部屋にシャワーがないとのこと。
だったら誰かがコメントに記載してもいいはず。
また、Wi-Hiが使えるのはフロントの近くのみ。部屋では無理。
reviews.reviewComments: For some reason, my room didn't have a shower. It's strange because they handed me a bath towel at check-in. If there wasn't one, it should have been noted. I didn't choose this hotel. I might have misunderstood since I can't speak Indonesian, but I heard that there are no showers in any of the rooms. If that's the case, someone should have mentioned it in the comments. Also, Wi-Fi is only available near the front desk. It's not possible in the room.
Great
Awesome
Nice
Not Bad
Good lah

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan bagus cs ramah².. hanya saja tidak seperti yg di pajang kan
reviews.reviewComments: The service is good and the customer service is friendly, but it is not as advertised.

reviews.originalComment: kamar yang dikasih tidak sesuai dengan pesanan!
reviews.reviewComments: The room that was given does not match the order!

reviews.originalComment: Lokasinya strategis ngk terlalu jauh dari jalan utama, lumayan bersih dan dapat harga promo juga
reviews.reviewComments: The location is strategic, not too far from the main road, quite clean, and you can also get a promotional price.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi pusat kota, harga dan kenyamanan sangat wort it...
reviews.reviewComments: The location in the city center, the price, and the comfort are very worth it...
Spacious comfortable clean room
Saya sangat puas dgn pelayanan hotel nya
Mantap
Buruk minta deposit kyk orang pengemis
